notes: HistGradientBoosting on engineered geo/ratio features (rooms-per-house, income*location).
CV-stacked ensemble (HGB + ExtraTrees + spatial-KNN) over geo features, ridge meta-learner.
LightGBM on geo features enriched with KMeans spatial-cluster distances and rotated coords.
CatBoost fed a leakage-free out-of-fold spatial-KNN target prior as an extra feature.
Blend of CatBoost + LightGBM fed leakage-free OOF spatial priors at MANY scales (k=5..150).
Log-target seed-bagged CatBoost with an HONEST self-excluded spatial KNN prior, blended with a non-tree Nystroem-RBF smooth spatial learner; predictions clipped to the price cap.
Honest self-excluded spatial KNN prior + density, fed to a log-target seed-bagged CatBoost with a monotone MedInc->price constraint, predictions clipped to the price cap.
